signals.headline: Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Rockets in Playoffs** | YES | HIGH confidence[3][4]
signals.raw:
Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Rockets in Playoffs** | YES | HIGH confidence[3][4]  
Lakers defeated Houston 101-94 in Game 2, leading 2-0 after Game 1 win (107-98); vaults title odds from 150-1 to 35-1 amid injuries to Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves[2][3]. Game 3 Friday in Houston[3].

Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 in East First Round** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][3]  
Cleveland won Game 2 (115-105) after Game 1 (126-113), targeting Raptors' Brandon Ingram defensively; Raptors coach Darko backs Jakob Poeltl for Game 3 tonight in Toronto[1][3][4]. No conference semifinals yet (first round ongoing)[3].
